purpose: Shopify theme architecture converted to Next.js/Tailwind patterns for BB
extraction_rule: Extract UX and conversion principles. Build from scratch in Next.js.

patterns.name: Announcement Bar
patterns.description: Full-width top strip for promos, free shipping threshold, urgency.
patterns.bb_status: LIVE — 'Fresh Batch Available' bar in app/page.tsx
patterns.bb_implementation: Full-width amber-700 div above main content
patterns.phase: Phase 2 — expand in Phase 3 with dynamic batch messaging

patterns.name: Product Card Grid
patterns.description: 3-column responsive card grid with image, name, price, CTA.

patterns.name: Featured Product Block
patterns.description: Single product highlight with image, description, quantity selector, add to cart.
patterns.bb_implementation: Add product detail section above pricing grid

patterns.name: Image with Text Section
patterns.description: Left/right split: product photo + brand story or value prop.
patterns.bb_implementation: md:grid-cols-2 section with product image + copy

patterns.name: Testimonials / Reviews
patterns.description: Social proof block with star ratings, customer quotes, verified badge.
patterns.phase: Phase 2 — replace placeholders with real quotes

patterns.name: Multi-Column Text
patterns.bb_status: LIVE — benefits section (Organic, Small Batch, No Preservatives)

patterns.name: Email Signup Section
patterns.description: Full-width email capture with incentive copy.

patterns.name: Cart Drawer
patterns.description: Slide-in cart with quantity controls, order bump, checkout CTA.
patterns.bb_status: NOT NEEDED — Stripe Checkout handles cart
patterns.bb_implementation: REJECT — Stripe hosted page replaces cart

patterns.name: Sticky Add to Cart Bar
patterns.description: Sticky header bar that appears after scrolling past product — shows price + CTA.
patterns.bb_implementation: Fixed top bar on scroll — md:flex hidden on mobile (mobile uses bottom bar)

patterns.name: Footer with Navigation
patterns.description: Multi-column footer: links, social, email signup, legal.
patterns.bb_implementation: Expand with: About, Contact, Privacy, Terms links

bootstrap_to_tailwind_map.tailwind: px-6 py-3 rounded-2xl bg-amber-700 text-white font-semibold
